form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months settled back and ran on when 6th of 9 at Ascot 3yo Hcp 62+ on April 4 over 1400m, 4 len behind Wheely carrying 57kg at $10. Previously second-up won by a neck at Belmont Park 3yo 0Mwly September 3 over 1300m in soft going defeating Fine Star with 59kg at $3.50. Second up winner in the past and is well placed at best.

form.formComment: At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.4 len at Belmont Park Mdn April 2 over 1400m defeating Mr Frodo with 57.5kg at $5.50.
